meta.name: Send WooCommerce new order notifications via WhatsApp with MoltFlow

name: WooCommerce New Order Notification via WhatsApp with MoltFlow

parameters.content:
## WooCommerce → WhatsApp Order Alert
Get instant WhatsApp notifications when a new order is placed on your WooCommerce store, powered by [MoltFlow](https://molt.waiflow.app).

**How it works:**
1. WooCommerce fires a webhook on new order
2. Order details are extracted (customer, items, total)
3. A WhatsApp notification is sent to the store owner
4. Optionally sends a confirmation to the customer too

## Setup (5 min)
1. Create a [MoltFlow account](https://molt.waiflow.app) and connect WhatsApp
2. Activate this workflow — copy the webhook URL
3. In WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → Webhooks, add a webhook for **Order created** pointing to this URL
4. Set `YOUR_SESSION_ID` and `OWNER_PHONE` in the Format Order node
5. Add MoltFlow API Key: Header Auth → `X-API-Key`
